original_image_tags: The page appears to be the reverse side of a document, showing significant bleed-through of typed text from the other side. The paper is aged, off-white/cream colored, with two punched holes at the top. There are handwritten annotations in blue ink and a stamped received mark.

elements.description: A blue ink stamp reading 'RECEIVED JUL 18 4 03 PM INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' with faint text above it and a handwritten blue ink note in the bottom left corner.
Faint, mirrored reverse-bleed typed text visible through the paper, including fragments of questions and a paragraph mentioning 'Command and Army Service Forces'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: a blue ink stamp with the specific text 'RECEIVED JUL 18 4 03 PM INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' and a handwritten blue ink note, with no contradictions on the quoted text or visual elements.
